notes: DDR2 reigned until DDR3 ramped in 2007-2009.

metric_value: DDR2 memory was introduced in server and workstation platforms in 2004-2005 with the Nocona/Lindenhurst platform. However, DDR2 did not achieve particularly long longevity as a platform; DDR3 began displacing it by 2007-2008. The platform served approximately 3-4 years in mainstream use.
notes: Placeholder. | DDR2 platform arrived in 2004 as predicted but was not especially long-lived; DDR3 emerged by 2007. Source: https://serverando.de/en/magazine/ddr2-ram-in-profile; Intel server platform roadmaps.
